channel.title: Microsoft Purview on considerITman
channel.description: Recent content in Microsoft Purview on considerITman

item.title: How to Configure Microsoft Purview Sensitivity Labels and Label Policies
item.description: Step-by-step guide to Microsoft Purview sensitivity labels: plan a label taxonomy, create labels and sublabels, publish policies, configure auto-labeling, and monitor activity. E3 vs E5 licensing explained.

item.title: Purview Endpoint DLP: Block Data Exfiltration from Windows Devices
item.description: Configure Purview Endpoint DLP on Windows 10/11 to block data exfiltration. Covers device onboarding, SIT conditions, block actions, and Activity Explorer.

item.title: How to Configure DLP Policies in Microsoft 365
item.description: Configure DLP policies in Microsoft Purview step by step. Covers SITs, simulation mode, Teams, Endpoint, and Copilot. Data breaches cost $4.44M in 2025.
